arts.ttl: Liverpool v Barca 'one of great Champions League nights'
arts.sum: Liverpool players and former staff relive one of the greatest comebacks in Champions League history, when they stunned Barcelona in 2018-19.

arts.ttl: 'He's the chosen one!' - the rise of Lamine Yamal
arts.sum: BBC Sport looks at the rise of Barcelona's superstar winger Lamine Yamal from his humble beginnings at La Masia to being seen as the next Lionel Messi.

arts.ttl: If Rangers can flick Europa League switch the rest won't matter and I feel something special is coming – Scott Arfield
arts.sum: Arfield is a veteran of nig European nights under the lights at Ibrox and suspects there's another in the pipeline despite Bilbao's quality

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs. Borussia Dortmund Predicted Lineups: Champions League Quarterfinals
arts.sum: Barcelona will hope to defend their home advantage and take a lead to the second leg at Signal Iduna Park.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Borussia Dortmund: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Barcelona vs Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League, with TV & live stream details, team news, predicted lineups & score prediction.

arts.ttl: ‘You don’t have to run all the time’ - Yamal reveals what he’s learnt at Barca
arts.sum: I think one thing I have learned this year is how to manage myself. Lamine Yamal has spoken out about what he’s been learning at Barcelona and specifically how he’s managing to play so many minutes for club and country .

arts.ttl: Ter Stegen reveals his tip to take over as Barca captain
arts.sum: Ter Stegen is closing in on a comeback from his knee injury but says he expects to see Pedri leading the team in the future. Ter Stegen also took time to praise Hansi Flick who is enjoying a superb first season in charge of the Catalan giants.
Barcelona star Gavi has this week moved to reveal his appreciation for the ongoing efforts of a fellow member of Hansi Flick’s squad. The player in question? Jules Koundé. Defender…

arts.ttl: Match Preview: Borussia Dortmund Look to get Revenge Against Barcelona in UCL Quarterfinal
arts.sum: The Champions League is back and Borussia Dortmund are on the road against one of Europe’s best teams: FC Barcelona . With Schlotterbeck out for the season, Borussia Dortmund’s backline will have to step up if they wish to keep one of Europe’s best players quiet.

arts.ttl: Guirassy hoping for ‘goal-fest’ as Dortmund take on Barca
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund star Serhou Guirassy is hoping for a “goal-fest” when his side take on Barcelona in the quarter-finals of the Champions League . “It is of course great to score against Barcelona – they are one of the top 10 teams in the world.
